infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Your app needs access to your photo library to upload profile pictures and workout photos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddOnlyUsageDescription: Your app needs permission to save photos to your library.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Your app uses your location to find nearby gyms and trainers.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Your app uses your location to find nearby gyms and trainers.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Your app needs access to the camera to take profile pictures and workout photos.
